ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Reserve
Off Calendar Dec-05-2016 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Dec-05-2016 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Reserve
Off Calendar Nov-14-2016 Continued To Dec-05-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the personal representative Patsy Joann McGuire and the Attorney Darrel Horsted to appear on December 5, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why receipts on the reserve of $15,000.00 have not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Yolanda Mazariegos. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Reserve
Off Calendar Aug-15-2016 Continued To Nov-14-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Off Calendar Apr-19-2016 Continued To May-03-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Re Filing Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Status Report
Off Calendar Mar-14-2016 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Re Filing Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Status Report
Off Calendar Feb-22-2016 Continued To Mar-14-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Darrel Horsted for Patsy Joann McGuire.

Mr. Horsted reported that he knows that they need to file the petition for final distribution, that they had hoped to have it filed by this date, that they had been delayed with a tax issue and that they need an additional 30 days. The Court stated that 30 days was too long and the status on filing a petition for final distribution was continued to March 14, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Charlene P. Kiesselbach. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Macksoud. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Re Filing Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Status Report
Off Calendar Jan-04-2016 Continued To Feb-22-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Receipt For Blocked Account
Off Calendar Jun-11-2013 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Receipt For Blocked Account
Off Calendar May-28-2013 Continued To Jun-11-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for Patsy McGuire.

Mr. Vann requested that matter be continued. Status on filing the receipts for blocked account was continued to 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy Chien.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1805 Pine St., Unit 22, San Francisco, Ca 94109)
Off Calendar Apr-26-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Darrel Cameron Horsted for Patsy McGuire.

The sale was confirmed at $418,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed March 20, 2013 as an all cash sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $393,000.00 is required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Nancy Bautista/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

10:35 a.m. Matter recalled. Mr. Horsted informed the Court that there was an issue with obtaining bond and requested that the funds be placed into a blocked account in lieu of bond. The Court granted Mr. Horsted's request. Status on filing of the receipt for blocked account was set for May 28, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.
